zh.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Unit: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield於大約1412年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親John Engaine28歲，母親Margaret Skipwith27歲。她於大約1432年與Anthony Selby在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1470年1月1日在英國越可爾約克享年59歲。

zh-hans.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Unit: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield于大约1412年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲John Engaine28岁，母亲Margaret Skipwith27岁。她于大约1432年与Anthony Selby在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1470年1月1日在英国越可爾約克享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joyce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently from the Norman male name Josce (Middle English Josse), which in turn is from Jodocus, a Latinized form of a Breton name, Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, borne by a 7th-century Breton saint. The name was in use in England among Breton followers of William the Conqueror. However, although this was fairly common as a male given name in the Middle Ages, it had virtually died out by the 14th century. There is evidence of its use as a girl's name from the 16th century onwards in parishes with strong Puritan links, which suggests that it may have been associated with the vocabulary word joy; see Joy . It was strongly revived in the 19th century under the influence of popular fiction. It is borne by characters in Mrs Henry Wood's East Lynne ( 1861 ) and Edna Lyall's In the Golden Days ( 1885 ). Modern use may well have been influenced also by the common Irish surname derived from the medieval Norman male name. See also Joss .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield was born about 1412, in Yorkshire, England, her father, John Engaine, was 28 and her mother, Margaret Skipwith, was 27. She married Anthony Selby about 1432, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 1 January 1470, in York, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Unit: Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield est née environ 1412, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Engaine, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Skipwith, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Anthony Selby environ 1432, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1470, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

Sie hat um 1432 in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Anthony Selby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Januar 1470 im Alter von 59 Jahren in York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Unit: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トイン
ja.lifeSummary: Joyce Eugaine Huntingfieldが約1412年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Engaineは28歳，母Margaret Skipwithは27歳であった。約1432年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインでAnthony Selbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1470年1月1日にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで59歳で死去した。

ko.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Unit: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield(이)가 대략 1412년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Engaine(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Skipwith(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 Anthony Selby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 1월 1일 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Anthony Selby aproximadamente 1432, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1470, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Unit: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield родилась около 1412 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Engaine было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Skipwith, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anthony Selby около 1432 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 января 1470 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.
